## listAttachmentsDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `attachments` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `attachments` and MCP tool `attachments_list`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
listAttachmentsDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskId: string;
}, ListAttachmentsResult, z.ZodObject<{
    taskId: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskId: string;
}, {
    taskId: string;
}>>
```
